title: Cannot read property of undefined
fixes: Check if object exists before accessing

title: TypeError: X is not a function

fixes: Check for typos in variable name

title: TypeError: Assignment to constant variable

Use object mutation instead of reassignment

title: RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded

title: SyntaxError: Unexpected token
fixes: Check for missing commas or brackets

fixes: Check for unclosed brackets or quotes

title: Cannot use import statement outside a module

title: Cannot destructure property of undefined/null

regex: Reduce of empty array with no initial value

title: TypeError: Cannot convert BigInt to number

title: TypeError: Cannot mix BigInt and other types
fixes: Convert both operands to same type

regex: Argument of type .* is not assignable

Wrap value in object if needed

title: FinalizationRegistry callback error

Return consistent values from get trap
Match has trap with actual property existence

title: TypeError: Proxy set trap returned falsish

Check if target property is writable

title: TypeError: Proxy deleteProperty trap violation
fixes: Ensure property is configurable on target

title: TypeError: Proxy getPrototypeOf must return object or null
fixes: Return object or null from getPrototypeOf trap

title: TypeError: Generator is already running
fixes: Don't call next() from within generator body

title: TypeError: Intl API not a constructor
fixes: Check browser/Node.js version supports the Intl API

title: DOMException: Object cannot be cloned (structuredClone)
fixes: Remove functions from object before cloning
Use JSON parse/stringify for simple objects

title: TypeError: Converting circular structure to JSON
fixes: Use replacer function to handle cycles
Use libraries like flatted or safe-stringify

title: Import assertions not supported
fixes: Use import attributes (with) instead of assert

title: Import attribute type not supported
fixes: Check runtime supports JSON/CSS import attributes

title: Top-level await not available in this context

regex: Cannot read private member .* from an object whose class did not declare it

title: RangeError: Invalid array length

fixes: Ensure count is non-negative finite integer

regex: toString\(\) radix must be between 2 and 36

regex: Setter must have exactly one formal parameter

title: TypeError: Spread requires iterable
fixes: Ensure value is iterable before spreading

title: SyntaxError: yield not allowed in arrow function

title: SyntaxError: for-await only in async functions
fixes: Use regular for-of for sync iterables

regex: Each member of the union.*is not callable

title: SyntaxError: new with optional chaining
fixes: Check constructor exists then call new separately

Verify Next.js version supports the API
Check app router vs pages router

title: Next.js unstable_cache revalidation issues
fixes: Check cache tags match between set and invalidate

title: server-only package imported in client
fixes: Don't import server-only modules in 'use client' files
Split server/client code into separate files
Use server-only package to enforce boundary

title: Turbopack module resolution failure
fixes: Some packages not yet compatible with Turbopack
Fall back to webpack: next dev --no-turbo

title: Radix UI Portal mount point is null
fixes: Ensure portal container exists in DOM
Use container prop to specify mount point

title: cmdk/Command component not rendering items
fixes: Use value prop for search matching

title: Sonner/toast not showing notifications
fixes: Check toast import from correct package
Verify provider is mounted in root

title: EADDRINUSE: Port already in use
fixes: Kill process using the port: lsof -i :PORT

title: ECONNREFUSED: Connection refused
fixes: Verify host and port are correct

title: ENOENT: No such file or directory
EACCES: Permission denied
fixes: Don't run as root; fix ownership

title: ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND (ESM)
fixes: Add .js extension to import paths in ESM
Verify file exists at resolved path

title: ERR_REQUIRE_ESM: require() of ES Module
fixes: Use dynamic import() instead of require()
Use older CJS version of package

title: ERR_UNKNOWN_FILE_EXTENSION: .ts files
fixes: Compile TS to JS before running

title: JWT: Invalid token or signature
fixes: Verify JWT secret matches between sign and verify
Check token hasn't been tampered with
Ensure algorithm matches: HS256 vs RS256

title: JWT: Token not yet active (nbf)
fixes: Remove nbf claim if not needed

title: Cannot set headers after they are sent
fixes: Check async callback isn't sending twice

title: Multer: Unexpected field name
fixes: Match field name in upload.single('fieldName') to form field
Check multipart form data field names

title: Multer: File size exceeds limit
fixes: Validate file size on client before upload

title: Multer: Too many files uploaded
fixes: Limit file count on client side

title: WebSocket: Invalid frame header
fixes: Check for proxy stripping upgrade headers
Ensure no middleware modifying WS frames

title: Socket.IO CORS blocked
fixes: Configure cors in io options: { cors: { origin: '*' } }
Add specific origin to Socket.IO cors
Set credentials: true if using cookies

title: Worker thread out of memory
fixes: Stream data instead of loading all at once

title: Worker: Cannot transfer MessagePort
fixes: Create new MessageChannel for each worker

title: child_process spawn ENOENT
fixes: On Windows use shell: true option

title: child_process: Operation not permitted
fixes: Verify command is allowed by security policy

title: Crypto: Invalid IV length
fixes: Use correct IV length for algorithm (16 bytes for AES)
Match IV size to cipher block size

title: Crypto: Invalid key length
fixes: Use correct key length (32 bytes for AES-256)
Derive key with scrypt/pbkdf2 to correct length
Check key encoding (hex vs utf8 vs base64)

title: ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE: Expected string
fixes: Convert value to string before passing
Check argument types match API requirements

title: Fetch/Undici: Body timeout
fixes: Check server is sending complete response

title: Fetch/Undici: Headers timeout
fixes: Add retry logic for slow servers

title: AbortController: Signal already aborted
fixes: Create new AbortController for each request

title: npm: No matching version found
fixes: Verify version exists: npm view package versions

title: npm: Unable to resolve dependency tree
fixes: Use npm install --force as last resort

title: Fastify: Invalid content length
fixes: Increase body limit in Fastify config

title: Fastify: Hook timeout
fixes: Increase hook timeout in plugin options
Ensure hooks call done() or return promise
Check for hanging async operations in hooks

title: Fastify: Already decorated with this name
Fastify: Schema validation failed
fixes: Fix request body to match JSON schema

title: EPIPE: Broken pipe
fixes: Handle EPIPE error in stream error handler
Check stream writable state before writing

title: ERR_HTTP_HEADERS_SENT
fixes: Check async code paths for double-send

title: ERR_STREAM_PREMATURE_CLOSE
fixes: Use pipeline() for proper error propagation
Check consumer isn't destroying stream early

title: TLS: Certificate hostname mismatch
fixes: Set rejectUnauthorized: false for dev only

title: TLS: Self-signed certificate error
fixes: Add CA certificate to trusted: ca option
Use proper certificate from CA for production

title: TLS: Certificate authority invalid
fixes: Use agent with ca option for specific requests

title: Prisma P2002: Unique constraint violation
fixes: Handle duplicate with upsert or try/catch

title: Prisma P2025: Record not found
fixes: Use findUnique with null check instead of findUniqueOrThrow

title: Prisma P1001: Cannot reach database
fixes: Check network/firewall between app and DB

title: Drizzle ORM: Column does not exist
CSP: Resource blocked by Content-Security-Policy
fixes: Add source to correct CSP directive

title: Express session store disconnected
fixes: Check Redis/database connection for session store

title: Passport: Failed to serialize user
fixes: Implement serializeUser: pass user.id to done()
Check user object has id property

title: Zod validation: Type mismatch
fixes: Fix input data type to match schema

title: ERR_USE_AFTER_CLOSE: Resource used after close
fixes: Recreate resource if needed after close

title: ERR_UNESCAPED_CHARACTERS in URL
fixes: Use URL constructor for proper encoding

title: Invalid cron expression
fixes: Check library's specific cron format support

title: Redis: Connection refused
fixes: Verify Redis is accessible from application

title: Redis: Authentication required
fixes: Add password to Redis connection config
Set AUTH in Redis URL: redis://:password@host

title: Mongoose: Operation buffering timed out
fixes: Increase bufferTimeoutMS or handle connection errors

title: ERR_AMBIGUOUS_ARGUMENT in assert
fixes: Don't pass empty string as message

title: ExperimentalWarning: Fetch API
fixes: Update Node.js to 21+ where fetch is stable

title: BullMQ: Missing lock for job
fixes: Don't process job longer than lock duration

title: BullMQ: Redis key type conflict
fixes: Clear the queue: remove old keys

title: ERR_INSPECTOR_NOT_AVAILABLE
fixes: Check Node.js built with inspector support

title: Vite: Failed to resolve import
fixes: Check import path and file exists

title: ERR_PACKAGE_PATH_NOT_EXPORTED
fixes: Check package.json exports field of dependency

title: tsx/ts-node: Unknown file extension .ts
fixes: Use tsx instead of ts-node for ESM
Set ts-node esm: true in tsconfig

title: Test runner: import in non-module
fixes: Add transform config for test runner
Check test file extension matches config

title: Container queries not supported
fixes: Check browser version supports container queries

title: Container query: Invalid container name
fixes: Use valid CSS identifier for container-name
Don't use CSS keywords as container names

title: Container query: No matching container ancestor
fixes: Add container-type to an ancestor element
Ensure container is above queried element in DOM

title: CSS @layer cascade ordering conflict
fixes: Define layer order at top: @layer reset, base, components, utilities
Unlayered styles always win over layered

title: @layer not recognized by tooling
fixes: Check CSS minifier version supports layers

title: @layer with @import order error
fixes: @import with layer must be first in file

title: :has() selector not supported
fixes: Consider JavaScript fallback for older browsers

title: :has() causing performance issues
fixes: Limit :has() scope with direct child selectors
Use class toggling with JS for performance-critical cases

title: CSS nesting not supported
fixes: Update browser or add postcss-nesting plugin

title: CSS nesting: & selector required for type selectors
fixes: Add & before type selectors in nesting: & div {}
Use & to start nested rules with element selectors
Compound selectors can omit & in modern spec

title: CSS nesting: @media inside rule
fixes: Nest @media inside selectors (valid in native nesting)
Ensures styles apply in correct context

title: CSS subgrid not supported
fixes: Polyfill with JavaScript for older browsers

title: Subgrid on both axes considerations
fixes: Use subgrid on one axis, explicit tracks on other
subgrid on both axes inherits all parent lines
Name grid lines for clarity with subgrid

title: View Transitions API not supported
fixes: Check browser support for View Transitions
Use feature detection before calling startViewTransition

title: View transition: Duplicate transition name
fixes: Ensure each view-transition-name is unique on page
Use dynamic names for list items

title: View transition skipped/rejected
fixes: Ensure element is visible during capture

title: CSS Anchor: No matching anchor element
fixes: Check anchor element is in same containing block

title: CSS Anchor: position-try/position-area error
fixes: Use valid position-area values: top, bottom, center

title: scroll() animation timeline not working
fixes: Ensure scroll container has overflow: scroll/auto
Set scroll-timeline-name on scroller if needed

title: view() animation timeline not triggering
fixes: Element must enter/exit scroll port to trigger
Verify element is child of scroll container

title: @property: initial-value required
fixes: Must provide valid initial value matching syntax

title: @property: inherits must be true/false
fixes: Set inherits: true or inherits: false

title: color-mix() not supported or invalid
fixes: Use syntax: color-mix(in srgb, red 50%, blue)
Specify color space: srgb, oklch, hsl

title: oklch() color not supported
fixes: Add fallback hex/rgb color before oklch
Check oklch values: L(0-1) C(0-0.4) H(0-360)

title: Wide gamut color out of range/not supported
fixes: Add sRGB fallback before wide gamut color
Clamp colors to sRGB for fallback

title: Tailwind v4: @theme not recognized
fixes: Check postcss-import processes file before Tailwind

title: Tailwind v4: @config deprecated pattern
fixes: Migrate config to CSS @theme in v4

title: Tailwind: @apply with unknown utility class
fixes: Check utility class exists in Tailwind config
Ensure content paths cover the class usage

title: Tailwind: Invalid arbitrary value syntax
fixes: Escape special characters in arbitrary values
Check for spaces in arbitrary values (use _ instead)

title: Tailwind: Dark mode classes not working
fixes: Check dark variant is being generated

title: Tailwind: No utility classes detected
fixes: Check content array paths in config/CSS
Ensure glob patterns match your files
Restart build after content config change

title: CSS Modules: Composition target not found
fixes: Check source file path in composes

title: CSS Modules: Class name conflict
fixes: Check import alias to avoid collisions

title: CSS Modules: Cannot compose from global
fixes: Only compose from other module classes
Import and extend the class normally

title: PostCSS: Parse error (Unknown word)
fixes: Update PostCSS parser for modern features

title: PostCSS: Plugin not found
fixes: Install the PostCSS plugin: npm install postcss-X

title: PostCSS: Version incompatibility
fixes: Install PostCSS 8 compatible version of plugin

title: Sass: Global built-in function deprecated
fixes: Use namespaced function: math.div() not math/

title: Sass: Slash division deprecated
fixes: Use calc() for plain CSS division

title: Sass: @use must come first
fixes: Move @use statements to top of file (before other rules)

title: Sass: Undefined variable or member
fixes: Verify variable is exported by source

title: Sass: Cannot find stylesheet to import
Stylelint: Unknown property warning
fixes: Update Stylelint for modern CSS properties
Use /* stylelint-disable */ for known modern props

title: PostCSS @import not resolving
fixes: Add postcss-import to PostCSS config first
Check relative paths from file location

title: PostCSS Nesting: Invalid syntax
fixes: Check if using spec or legacy syntax edition

title: Lightning CSS: Cannot parse
fixes: Set targets for correct browser support

title: Lightning CSS: Nesting not downcompiled
fixes: Set browser targets to include older browsers
Add targets in bundler config for lightning-css
Nesting needs targets that don't support it natively

title: z-index not working (stacking context)
fixes: Check if parent creates stacking context (transform, opacity, etc)
Create explicit stacking context with isolation: isolate
Use higher z-index within same context

title: position: sticky not working
fixes: Ensure no overflow: hidden/auto on ancestor
Check parent has enough height for scroll

title: backdrop-filter not working
fixes: Set background to semi-transparent (not fully opaque)

title: aspect-ratio not supported in older browsers
fixes: Set width and height as fallback dimensions

title: Flex gap not supported in older browsers
fixes: Use margin fallback for flex gap

title: CSS clamp()/min()/max() not supported
fixes: Add fallback fixed value before clamp()
Polyfill with media queries for breakpoints

title: overflow: clip not supported
fixes: Add both: overflow: hidden; overflow: clip;

title: text-wrap: balance not supported
fixes: This is progressive enhancement, no fallback needed
Falls back to normal text wrapping gracefully

title: text-wrap: pretty not supported
fixes: Progressive enhancement: falls back to normal

title: @scope rule not supported
fixes: Use CSS Modules or BEM as alternative
Add fallback with more specific selectors

title: @starting-style not supported
fixes: Use @keyframes as fallback for entry animations
Combine with allow-discrete for display transitions

title: Cannot transition display property
fixes: Add overlay: auto for top-layer exit animations

title: ::backdrop not inheriting styles
fixes: Use CSS custom properties for shared values

title: Body scroll not locked with dialog/modal
fixes: Add overflow: hidden to body when dialog open

title: Logical properties not supported
fixes: Add physical property fallback before logical
Check browser target supports logical properties

title: content-visibility: auto causing layout shift
fixes: Test with real content to estimate size

title: Font loading causing FOIT/FOUT
fixes: Use font-display: optional to avoid layout shift

title: @font-face format not recognized
fixes: Check font file is served with correct MIME type

title: CSS variable fallback not working
fixes: Fallback only applies if variable is not defined (not invalid)
Use: var(--color, red) for undefined fallback
For invalid values, use @property with initial-value

title: CSS custom property not animating
fixes: Unregistered custom properties can't be animated
Set initial-value for animation start state

title: calc() invalid expression
fixes: Don't mix incompatible units without calc()

title: Grid auto-fill/auto-fit not working
fixes: Use minmax() with auto-fill: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr))
auto-fill creates empty tracks, auto-fit collapses them

title: Grid fr unit creating 0-width columns
fixes: Use minmax(0, 1fr) to allow shrinking below content

title: Grid item overflowing its track
fixes: Add min-width: 0 or overflow: hidden to grid item
Set word-break or overflow-wrap on text

title: Flex item not shrinking (min-width)
fixes: flex-shrink respects min-content size by default

title: flex-basis vs width conflict
fixes: flex-basis takes priority in flex layout
Set flex-basis: auto to use width value

title: mix-blend-mode not working due to stacking
fixes: Add isolation: isolate to parent to contain blending
Background must not be transparent for blending

title: will-change causing performance/memory issues
fixes: Only apply will-change just before animation
Don't apply to too many elements simultaneously

title: @supports giving incorrect results
fixes: Test property:value pair, not just property

title: Print styles not applied correctly
fixes: Use print-specific units and avoid vh/vw

title: prefers-reduced-motion not working
fixes: Test by enabling reduce motion in OS settings

title: prefers-color-scheme not updating
fixes: Some browsers override with internal settings

title: Container query units (cqi/cqw/cqh) not working
fixes: Container units reference nearest container ancestor
Check browser supports container query units

title: Tailwind v4: Prefix configuration change
fixes: In v4, configure prefix via @import 'tailwindcss' prefix(tw)
Update all class usages with new prefix

title: Tailwind: Important selector strategy not working
Animation janky/not smooth (60fps)
fixes: Use will-change: transform for upcoming animations
Avoid animating layout properties (width, height, top)

title: transform percentage relative to element not parent
fixes: transform: translate(%) is relative to element itself
Use position + inset for parent-relative movement
Use calc with custom properties for parent-relative

title: Negative outline-offset not visible
fixes: Ensure element has dimensions larger than offset
Check outline isn't clipped by overflow: hidden
Use box-shadow as alternative for inset borders

title: pointer-events: none not blocking child clicks
fixes: Set pointer-events: none on children too
Use pointer-events: auto on specific interactive children
Check z-index stacking of clickable elements

title: Dynamic viewport units need fallback
fixes: Check browser support for dynamic viewport units

title: accent-color inconsistent across browsers
fixes: Use accent-color for basic form theming
Add appearance: none for full custom styling
